howItWorks.intro: This ev charging station roi calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Payback Period
rules.formula: Payback = Install Cost / Monthly Net Profit
rules.explanation: Total investment divided by monthly revenue minus electricity and maintenance costs.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How much does it cost to install an EV charger?
faq.a: Level 2 chargers cost $3,000-$10,000 installed. DC fast chargers range from $30,000-$150,000+ depending on power output.
In high-traffic locations with 4+ sessions/day, Level 2 chargers can pay back in 2-3 years. DC fast chargers need higher utilization but earn more per session.
